text: Amazon is scheduled to report Q2 2025 earnings this week as part of a critical earnings period for Big Tech, with Microsoft, Meta, Apple, and Amazon collectively representing approximately $11.3 trillion in market value [CHUNK_ID: 95e75447-3c30-49f6-861e-b4c471cfa261]. Market analysts are closely monitoring the results, with expectations centered on AI-powered AWS growth and advertising revenue as key drivers for an upbeat Q2 outlook [CHUNK_ID: f3922ad9-85d8-409b-916a-444e08a6a248]. The earnings release comes during a broader Q2 season that has shown more positive surprises than negative ones so far [CHUNK_ID: b5fd3368-74d2-4486-bb11-85141dc4fcd8].
